title: Spud's Revised Recipes
body:
Spud's Revised Recipes (by me :D) takes multiple recipes from Minecraft and changes them to make gameplay more enjoyable.

- Lodestone's can be crafted with copper (you can actually use them now!)
- Rails are cheaper (build with them more in the early game)
- Chain recipe yields more (1 ingot equaling less than 1 chain was ridiculous)

![lodestone](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_b00c7969-206b-459c-8494-3edc539a736f.png)
![rails](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_73282b86-a56b-4446-98b0-ddbecd946448.png)
![chains](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_ef3929fb-eca3-4822-b2d9-7c5a1cdc2e6b.png)
![bundle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a783ff1804644b9fd8b9ad1e417593d3eda8869d.png)

Much more balanced!
